name: GlobalProtect
notes: VPN client. Not a standard window app — lives in menu bar tray.

layout.menu_bar_icon: menu bar item 1 of menu bar 2
layout.notes: Click menu bar icon to open panel. Panel may appear as AX window or as popover with no child elements. After quit+reopen, shows as standard window with full AX tree.

steps: 1. Open panel: click menu bar icon. If no AX window, quit+reopen GP.
2. Click Connect (JXA findButton). Only if disconnected.
4. Type password: AX find text field → get position → cliclick c:x,y → cliclick t:password → cliclick kp:return

flow: Search for the VPN account entry (check TOOLS.md for which entry)
password_source.fallback: op CLI with --reveal flag (requires Touch ID, check TOOLS.md for item ID)

password_notes: SSO password ≠ SSH password — check TOOLS.md for details
osascript keystroke() does NOT work in GP WebView — must use cliclick
AX findTextField() gets position → calculate center → cliclick click+type
SSO page has timeout — complete Next→password→Enter quickly
1Password GUI method preferred over op CLI (avoids Touch ID)

quirks.panel_not_window: GP panel from menu bar click often has no AX children. Workaround: quit GP → open -a GlobalProtect → wait 5s → standard window appears.
quirks.webview_input: Password field is WebView. AX keystroke/setValue don't work. Use cliclick.
quirks.sso_timeout: SSO page expires quickly. Do Next→password→Enter in one shot.
quirks.disconnect_button_means_connected: If Disconnect button exists, VPN is connected even if login window is still showing.
